info.description:
This is the API reference document for the HPE Flex Solutions data service.
It provides endpoints to view and manage Flex device and orders solutions.
info.title: HPE Flex Solutions

get.description:
This endpoint allows you to retrieve and search for devices. You can filter, sort, and paginate the results.
**Pagination:** This endpoint supports offset-based pagination using `limit` and `offset` parameters.

parameters.description:
Filter expressions consisting of simple comparison operations joined by logical operators.
For the v1beta1 API, the following fields are supported for filtering under the [ODATA specification](https://www.odata.org/documentation/): * `id` * `macAddress` * `serialNumber` * `resourceId` * `partNumber` * `name` * `type` * `model` * `make` * `billingAccountName` * `billingTier`

Filter example 1.description: Match all devices with given selected filters

Filter example 2.description: Match all devices with given selected filters
Filter example 2.value: resourceId eq '554c7740-355f-4ece-8334-3fe9ea9ee33e' and billingAccountName eq 'HPE Tech Care'

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Comma separated list of fields to be returned in the response. If not provided, all fields will be returned.
All fields are supported.
parameters.name: select

parameters.description:
Comma separated list of fields to be sorted by in the response.
The default sorting order is by resourceId in ascending order.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of entities to return with a maximum of 100.
parameters.name: limit

metadata.access_token: Permission is denied to perform requested operation.

metadata.apiRateLimit: Too Many Requests. Rate limit has exceeded a predefined value.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: The number of requests allowed in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: The number of requests remaining in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Number of seconds until the quota resets

get.description:
This endpoint allows you to retrieve and search for orders. You can filter, sort, and paginate the results.
**Pagination:** This endpoint supports offset-based pagination using `limit` and `offset` parameters.

parameters.description:
Filter expressions consisting of simple comparison operations joined by logical operators.
For the v1beta1 API, the following fields are supported for filtering under the [ODATA specification](https://www.odata.org/documentation/): * `id` * `billingAccountId` * `sowId` * `billingAccountName` * `customerName` * `resellerName` * `partnerName` * `distributorName` * `isFlexPartner`

Filter example 1.description: Match all orders with given selected filters

Filter example 2.description: Match all orders with given selected filters
Filter example 2.value: sowId eq 'OPE-0011261086' and customerName eq 'HPE Tech Care'

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Comma separated list of fields to be returned in the response. If not provided, all fields will be returned.
All fields are supported.
parameters.name: select

parameters.description:
Comma separated list of fields to be sorted by in the response.
The default sorting order is by `orderEndDate` in ascending order.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of entities to return with a maximum of 100.
parameters.name: limit

offset.description: The offset of the returned page.

total.description: The total number of items in the collection that match the filter query, if one was provided in the request.

metadata.access_token: Permission is denied to perform requested operation.

metadata.apiRateLimit: Too Many Requests. Rate limit has exceeded a predefined value.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: The number of requests allowed in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: The number of requests remaining in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Number of seconds until the quota resets

get.description:
This endpoint allows distinct transformative queries for orders.
A transform query applies a logical function to a resource set, such as aggregating by a element.
**Pagination:** This endpoint supports offset-based pagination using `limit` and `offset` parameters.

parameters.description:
Field to be grouped by. Will return unique results of that type.
Supported fields are: * `sowId` * `customerName` * `billingAccountName` * `billingAccountId` * `partnerName`
(partnerName is a unique combined set of resellerName and distributorName)
parameters.name: group-by

parameters.description:
Filter expressions consisting of simple comparison operations joined by logical operators.
For the v1beta1 API, the following fields are supported for filtering under the [ODATA specification](https://www.odata.org/documentation/): * `billingAccountId` * `sowId` * `billingAccountName` * `customerName` * `resellerName` * `distributorName` * `partnerName`

Filter example 1.description: Match all orders with given selected filters

Filter example 2.description: Match all orders with given selected filters
Filter example 2.value: sowId eq 'OPE-0011261086' and customerName eq 'HPE Tech Care'

parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Fields to be sorted by in the response.
The default sorting order is by the group-by field in ascending order.
The sort field must be one of the group-by fields, if given.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Number of entities to return with a maximum of 100.
parameters.name: limit

metadata.access_token: Permission is denied to perform requested operation.

metadata.apiRateLimit: Too Many Requests. Rate limit has exceeded a predefined value.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: The number of requests allowed in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: The number of requests remaining in the current time window

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Number of seconds until the quota resets

get.summary: Get distinct transformative data for orders
